title: A new chapter for US banking. Powered by Prividium.
message_html: A new chapter for US banking. Powered by Prividium. ...
snippet: ZKsync (@zksync): A new chapter for 🇺🇸 banking. Powered by Prividium. Catch @gluk64 on stage at the #DCBlockchain Summit discussing the launch of tokenized deposit network with Gene Ludwig, CEO @carinetwork & 27th Comptroller of the Currency. 🗓️March 18 ⏰1.35pm 🎙️Moderated by @jacqmelinek
